markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX Labs team to Madrona's talent partner and discuss hiring strategies and resources.](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs is rapidly scaling, with a focus on both technical (product/engineering) and client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Madrona offers various talent resources, including resume distribution, comp data, and networking connections](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX is prioritizing hiring recruiters to manage high-volume hiring needs, especially for client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Collaboration opportunities exist for amplifying technical role visibility and leveraging VC networks](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs' Hiring Model and Priorities

  - [Dual focus: high-caliber technical team (product/engineering) and volume hiring for client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Aiming for "Netflix mentality" of talent density for technical hires: senior, top-of-market talent](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Partnering with Quantum Talent for key technical hires](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Hiring \~10 managing directors (heads of growth, VP of growth, director of SEO/content)](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Receiving \~1000 applicants daily, using AI-driven screening process](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

### Recruiter Hiring Strategy

  - [Seeking two key recruiter roles: senior technical recruiter and senior go-to-market recruiter](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Prioritizing recruiters with strong networks, hustle, and experience scaling companies (20-100 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Location-agnostic, but U.S.-based candidates might have an edge for network strength](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Emphasis on resourcefulness and ability to leverage AI/automation in recruiting processes](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### Madrona's Talent Support Offerings

  - [Access to Coda document with resources, compensation playbook, and benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Weekly executive resume distribution](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Potential introductions to specialized recruiting agencies](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Amplification of job postings and key hires through Madrona's channels post-funding announcement](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Connections to other VC talent partners (e.g., Greylock, Iconic, Battery)](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Current Team and Notable Hires

  - [24 people currently in the company](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Recently hired Felipe (ex-Airbnb and Stripe) as principal engineer, starting officially in March](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Marcel (co-founder) has a strong network for growth marketing roles (70% InMail response rate)](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### Compensation and Benefits Resources

  - [Currently using Carta for comp benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Shannon to provide access to Pave for additional compensation data](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shannon to send Coda document access and Pave invitation](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Bridget to introduce Shannon to Daniel (co-founder) for technical hiring discussion](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2413.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider announcing Felipe's hire to leverage his network for further technical recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [Shannon to keep an eye out for potential recruiter candidates](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [GrowthX to potentially leverage other VC talent partners (e.g., Gia, Jenny) for recruiter recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [Plan for future in-person meeting when GrowthX team visits Seattle](https://fathom.video/share/rye21bxC9DC5W8-icZrx8cUrscygTnzR?tab=summary&timestamp=2323.0)
